title: crotalaria johannis
intro: Crotalaria johannis, also known as the Johannis bush or wild rattle, is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria johannis include its use as a treatment for fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria johannis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
